TextView.value: Kit Settings
Auto Sit Kit - Makes the character sit when health and/or nano fall below the thresholds.
Health % / Nano % - Thresholds that trigger auto sit behavior.
Save - Saves the current health and nano threshold values.
POH Pathing
Path to portal mobs/Return - Sends the character to the portal mob. Clicking again returns them
to the position where the button was first pressed. Set positions in POH Positions.
Pho Buff - Opens a window showing the remaining duration of Phobettor's Shattered Mirror
of the Xan buff.
Broadcast Settings - Broadcasts the following options to your team:
(12man) Morph Pathing - Auto-paths characters to the correct podium to remove
the morph debuff.
(DB3) Shapes - Auto-uses the DB3 shapes in the fire room.
(Sub) Belly Pathing - Automatically returns characters from the Belly.
(Sub) Eumenides - Moves characters to and from their Eumenides positions.
Set positions in Eumenides Positions.
Show traps and mines - Displays a ring indicating the trigger radius of detected
traps or mines.
(POH) Highlight Rifts - Shows a ring around the rift. Red = <10s,
Yellow = 10–20s, Green = >20s remaining.
(POH) Path to Alters - Automatically moves the character to the correct altar if they
receive the debuff in the second boss room.
Eumenides Positions - Assigns the character's pathing position for the portal mobs
during Eumenides. Used by (Sub) Eumenides logic.
POH Positions - Stores each character's return position. Used by
'Path to portal mobs/Return'.
/aufly - Toggles fly selections.
/autosit - Toggles auto sitting with kits.
/gridall - all use grid nano or can.
